nasb.text: Remember Him before the silver cord is broken and the golden bowl is crushed, the pitcher by the well is shattered and the wheel at the cistern is crushed;

esv.text: before the silver cord is snapped, or the golden bowl is broken, or the pitcher is shattered at the fountain, or the wheel broken at the cistern,

cnv.text: 銀鍊斷掉，金碗破裂，瓶子在泉旁破碎，打水的輪子在井邊破爛。

ccb.text: 银链断裂，金碗摔坏，泉旁的瓶子破碎，井口的轮子朽烂。

csbs.text: 不要等到银链断开， 金碗破裂， 罐子在泉源旁破碎， 水轮在水窖边破烂；
